metadata.description: Claude Code custom skills for personal productivity

plugins.name: remind
plugins.description: macOS notification timer - set reminders with relative or absolute time

plugins.name: slack-scheduled-message
plugins.description: Schedule a Slack message (configurable destination, default self-DM) with a `claude --resume` command for the current session, plus list/cancel scheduled messages

plugins.name: weather-daily
plugins.description: Daily weather brief for Korea — KMA forecast + air quality + UV, posted to Slack as actionable advice (outfit / umbrella / mask)

plugins.name: fearandgreed
plugins.description: Daily CNN Fear & Greed Index posted to Slack — score, rating, gauge, and prev close/week/month/year comparison

plugins.name: cat-fact-daily
plugins.description: Daily cat fact posted to Slack in the 'Momo' cat persona (Korean)

plugins.name: cat-photo-daily
plugins.description: Daily random cat photo with a 'Momo' cat-persona one-liner, posted to Slack

plugins.name: slack-edit-message
plugins.description: Edit (chat.update) or delete (chat.delete) your own Slack messages via a user OAuth token

plugins.name: slack-reactions
plugins.description: Remove a reaction (reactions.remove) or list reactions you left (reactions.list) via a user OAuth token

plugins.name: slack-pins
plugins.description: Pin (pins.add), unpin (pins.remove), or list (pins.list) Slack channel messages via a user OAuth token

plugins.name: slack-bookmarks
plugins.description: Manage a Slack channel's link bookmark bar (bookmarks.add/edit/remove/list) via a user OAuth token

plugins.name: slack-files
plugins.description: Upload a local file to a Slack channel or delete a file via a user OAuth token (external-upload flow)

plugins.name: slack-utils
plugins.description: Slack single-endpoint utilities: generate a message permalink (chat.getPermalink) and delete a canvas (canvases.delete) via a user OAuth token

plugins.name: slack-status
plugins.description: Set your own Slack custom status (users.profile.set) and presence (users.setPresence) via a user OAuth token

plugins.name: slack-dnd
plugins.description: Control your Slack Do Not Disturb: start/end snooze and check DND status via a user OAuth token

plugins.name: slack-channel-admin
plugins.description: Create, archive, rename, set topic/purpose, invite/kick members, and mark-read Slack channels via a user OAuth token (conversations.*)

plugins.name: slack-reminders
plugins.description: Create/list/complete/delete your own Slack reminders (reminders.*) via a user OAuth token

plugins.name: slack-usergroups
plugins.description: Create/update Slack user groups and replace their membership via a user OAuth token (usergroups:write)
